title: Kratom Use is Surging in the US with Life-changing Consequences
summary_en: A new study published in Addiction has found that kratom use – measured as kratom exposures reported to US poison centers – and cases of severe medical outcomes linked to kratom use have surged in the US over the past decade.
title_cn: 美国克拉托姆使用量激增 产生改变人生的严重后果
